summary: The diff implements most of the requested requirements: a new AddContactDetailsPage with form fields, save/skip navigation, backend contact storage, and post-login routing. However, REQ-2 (displaying the logged-in user's name prominently at the top) is only partially implemented — the component supports a userName prop but App.tsx never passes it. The backend lacks a visible retrieve method for contact details as required by REQ-4. The migration module returns an empty contacts list rather than persisting existing data. There is also a constraint violation: useActor.ts was modified despite the constraint prohibiting it.

missing_requirements.requirement: Display the logged-in user's name prominently at the top of the Add Contact Details screen after login.
missing_requirements.reason: AddContactDetailsPage accepts a userName prop and fetches userProfile internally, but App.tsx never passes the userName prop when rendering AddContactDetailsPage, so the name will only display if getCallerUserProfile returns data from a prior saveCallerUserProfile call that may not have occurred at this point in the flow.

missing_requirements.requirement: The backend actor has a method to retrieve contact details for a given principal.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo diff shows a saveContact method is called from the frontend mutation, but no getContact or equivalent retrieval query method for contact details is visible in the truncated diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Contact details persist across canister upgrades.
missing_requirements.reason: The migration module defines a run function but returns an empty contacts list rather than migrating existing contact data, meaning contacts would be lost on upgrade rather than persisted.

hallucinated_features.description: useActor.ts was modified to add getSecretParameter and caffeineAdminToken initialization logic.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build constraints explicitly state 'Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ (useInternetIdentity.ts, useActor.ts)'. The diff shows useActor.ts was modified.

hallucinated_features.description: A URL parameter utility module with session storage and hash-based routing helpers was added.
hallucinated_features.reason: No requirement requested URL parameter utilities, session parameter storage, or hash-based routing helpers. This is unrelated to the contact details feature.
